title: Resolution Recommending to the Local Chief Executive Honorable Antonio L. Kalaw Through the Municipal Health Officer and Sanitary Inspectors to Revisit and Enforce Health Protocols and Guidelines Set Forth by the Iatf, DOH and Municipal Ordinances in Relation to the Operation of Funeral Parlors in the Municipality. Author (s) : Councilor (s)miko C. Pelegrina,geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon,mike Dexter A. Concio, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris Dayril B. Bagnes, Rodora P. Loares, Arlene P. D
